transcript: Ohhh, Aunt Bee, she don't want to hear this ol' country guitar.
He plays, and he sings well, too!
Ah, well... it's not good, but it's loud. [laughs]
'[delayed]' [indecipherable] I'll be home soon... you know, pay everybody in Denver what I did. So... so many people that cared for me, and I... and I just... I screwed them over, and I'm sorry.
